markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Clarify the partnership pause and define next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The partnership is paused until Jan 2025, not canceled. The delay is internal, driven by a new SVP of Marketing (Dan) and a need to align on a core strategy for "use cases" and "templates."](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Zapier must first build foundational infrastructure (e.g., success tracking) to measure ROI. This prevents a "set up for failure" scenario where work can't be validated and the program is prematurely shut down.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [A meeting with Dan is targeted for the first week of December to reintroduce GrowthX and maintain momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Pause Rationale

  - [The pause is driven by internal strategy misalignment, not pricing.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [**Key Factors:**](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
      - [**New SVP of Marketing (Dan):** Recently joined and is onboarding.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)
      - [**Strategic Ambiguity:** No consensus on the definition of "use cases" or "templates" (e.g., Zapier, new product, AI).](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [**Leadership Consensus:** Danielle and Janine recommended pausing to avoid building the wrong thing, a view reinforced at a recent exec offsite.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use the pause to define a clear strategy before engaging GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)

### Foundational Work Required

  - [Zapier lacks the infrastructure to measure the success of new templates.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**Significance:** Launching a large-scale project without tracking would prevent ROI validation, risking the program's premature cancellation.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)
  - [**Ownership:** The initiative may require a dedicated, full-time owner, as the current plan for Janine to dedicate 20–30% of her time is insufficient for a "big bet."](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=344.0)

### Path Forward

  - [GrowthX will be reintroduced to Dan in a December meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [**GrowthX Positioning:**](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [**Existing Relationship:** Leverage the connection between Marcel and Wade to establish credibility.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=617.0)
      - [**Proven Expertise:** Showcase successful template work for clients like Lovable and Ramp.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
      - [**Flexible Services:** Offer a range of content services (SEO/GEO-optimized templates, guides, tool databases).](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [**Zapier Preparation:**](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [Janine is creating a one-pager to define the template strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [Kaveh will share this document with Tyler before the December meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kaveh:**](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Inform Dan about the upcoming meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Share the template strategy one-pager with Tyler via Slack (EOW Nov 14).](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [Connect Tyler with Dan's EA to schedule the meeting for the first week of December.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
  - [**Tyler:**](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [Send a follow-up email with an overview and resources for Dan.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
      - [Schedule the meeting with Dan's EA.](https://fathom.video/share/pERT1fAyrXCw2shgTDWvjfzgkm63rrUw?tab=summary&timestamp=576.0)
